top_signals.title: US Coast Guard Awards Contract for Construction of Training Facilities in Yorktown
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Coast Guard has awarded a $17.8 million contract to Ocean Construction Services Inc. for the construction of new engineering and weapons training facilities at Training Center (TRACEN) Yorktown, Virginia.The project is a critical step…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: U.S. CFTC secures deal with National Hockey League on prediction market safeguards
